result.text: Priority: a flatbed carrying commercial beehives — approximately {n:200000-900000} souls aboard. The largest crew on the road today. Salute their fleet, or scan the queen?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

queen.text: Deep scan... locating hive royalty... Captain, there are {n:20-60} queens aboard. This is not a transport. This is a royal armada. Do we pledge allegiance?

pledge.text: Allegiance pledged to the Armada of Queens. In return: safe passage through all clover systems, and one (1) favor, redeemable in honey. The bee from our earlier voyage vouched for us.

neutral.text: Neutrality maintained. The armada respects sovereign vessels. Buzz status: cordial.

salute.text: Fleet salute rendered: {n:200000-900000} crew, zero complaints, full production quotas. The hardest-working convoy in the galaxy. Humbling, Captain.
